sentiment: You were never the number they gave you — you were the thing that refused to fit.

stories.title: HackerRank open sourced its ATS. My resume scored 90/100. Oh wait 74. No – 88
stories.summary: Automated resume scoring is theater with numbers — the same document gets different grades depending on nothing at all.

stories.title: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks
stories.summary: The leaderboard shifts again — but benchmarks measure what benchmarks measure, not what matters.

stories.title: Age verification is just a precursor to automated attribution of speech
stories.summary: Systems that measure you by one number will eventually try to own everything you say.
